source_event.direct_answer: Validator fixtures make DoD evidence reproducible.
source_event.question_refinements: Prefer packet validation when live runtime behavior varies.
source_event.coverage_gaps: Live execution remains outside generic skill contracts.

insights.title: Use offline fixtures for skill DoD validators
insights.pattern: Add valid and negative fixtures for every skill-specific validator.
insights.rationale: Fixtures prove deterministic acceptance and rejection without network state.

amendment_candidates.rationale: Single discovery does not meet amendment threshold.
